hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'gh pr create' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"STOP: You must run /sdk-review before creating a PR. If sdk-review has NOT been run in this session, abort this PR creation and run /sdk-review first. Only proceed with gh pr create after the review passes."}}'
